content: polyforge ieops-mem live smoke test
GPU node autoscaler reads from CRD status
Reconciler must be idempotent on every Reconcile call
Drop sqlite-vss in favor of sqlite-vec — better DELETE support
All worktrees live under .worktrees/<branch> and are gitignored
Redis Cloud asia-neast1 endpoint serves Asia-region gateway
Redis Cloud us-west1 endpoint serves US-region gateway
Image tag format is YYYYMMDD-shorthash
Helm umbrella chart lives at deploy/ieops-helm
Squash-merge is the canonical PR strategy on this repo
FastAPI lifespan blocks until DB migrate completes
ms-precision timestamps prevent same-second update_at collisions
Make health target now retries up to 10 times with 2s sleep
bge-small-en-v1.5 is 33M params and outputs 384-dim L2-normalized vectors
RRF k=60 is the de-facto fusion constant for hybrid retrieval
FTS5 external-content tables stay in sync via INSERT UPDATE DELETE triggers
Defer cross-encoder reranker until corpus exceeds 10000 rows
BM25 wins literal-phrase queries that pure vector embeddings undervalue
Pre-deploy snapshot saved at opt ieops-mem snapshots directory
Rollback procedure replaces ieops-mem db with the snapshot file
polyforge-coding pf2 pr swallows success as RuntimeError known bug
pf2 push fails on origin HEAD resolution when raw git push works
Auto mode classifier blocks SSH to production credential reads
Memory MCP scope is deferred to a separate workstream
DROP COLUMN on SQLite requires version 3.35 or newer
sqlite-vec 0.1.7 brute-force KNN is sub-millisecond up to 100k vectors
Daily encrypted backup pushed to GMISWE ieops-mem-backup repo
HASH_SECRET must be at least 32 bytes or the service refuses to start
showable=0 hides a memory from list search but author can still GET it
author_key_id binds a memory to the writer key that created it
